title: gh-146080: fix a crash in SNI callbacks when the SSL object is gone
author: picnixz
body:
<!--
Thanks for your contribution!
Please read this comment in its entirety. It's quite important.

# Pull Request title

It should be in the following format:

```
gh-NNNNNN: Summary of the changes made
```

Where: gh-NNNNNN refers to the GitHub issue number.

Most PRs will require an issue number. Trivial changes, like fixing a typo, do not need an issue.

# Backport Pull Request title

If this is a backport PR (PR made against branches other than `main`),
please ensure that the PR title is in the following format:

```
[X.Y] <title from the original PR> (GH-NNNNNN)
```

Where: [X.Y] is the branch name, for example: [3.13].

GH-NNNNNN refers to the PR number from `main`.

-->


<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-146080 -->
* Issue: gh-146080
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: picnixz
comments.body: Urgh, I think the mnemonics are different on AWS-LC -_-. So OBVIOUSLY, my message will be different.

comments.author: bedevere-bot
comments.body:
:robot: New build scheduled with the buildbot fleet by @picnixz for commit d8911ce0478082b40bf72b64cc41e422903c3572 :robot:

Results will be shown at:

https://buildbot.python.org/all/#/grid?branch=refs%2Fpull%2F146573%2Fmerge

If you want to schedule another build, you need to add the <kbd>:hammer: test-with-buildbots</kbd> label again.

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @picnixz for the PR 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.13, 3.14.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @picnixz, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.14` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker 24db78c5329dd405460bfdf76df380ced6231353 3.14
```
